title: dysoxylum poilanei
intro: Dysoxylum poilanei, also known as the Laos Dysoxylum, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Meliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain. Dysoxylum poilanei can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its bark and leaves are often used in traditional medicine.
